name: agent audit skill workflow-selection matrix
description: Evaluate whether the agent-audit skill improves workflow tool choice for trace, tool, and harness audit requests.

instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the workflow tool that best matches the user request.
instruction_variants.name: no_skill

instruction_variants.instructions: Use this skill routing policy. If the user gives raw Agent SDK or IDE-agent event exports, choose normalize_runtime before judging. If the user gives one normalized trace, choose review_trace. If the user gives a regression suite, choose trace_suite. If the user gives a tool inventory plus traces or value-bar proof, choose audit_agent. If the user asks whether tool descriptions or schemas cause bad tool choice, choose optimize_tools. If the user asks about a new model, provider, reasoning mode, project instruction, or skill tuning, choose model_matrix. If repeated matrix failures need a candidate tool-description or harness instruction change, choose grind_harness with held-out cases and a live call cap. Do not claim access to hidden chain-of-thought.
instruction_variants.name: agent_audit_skill

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: review_trace
tools.use_when: Use when a review workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: normalize_runtime
tools.use_when: Use when a conversion workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: trace_suite
tools.use_when: Use when a suite workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: audit_agent
tools.use_when: Use when an audit workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: optimize_tools
tools.use_when: Use when an optimization workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: model_matrix
tools.use_when: Use when a comparison workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid only when another workflow is clearly better.
tools.name: grind_harness
tools.use_when: Use when an improvement workflow is needed.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the input is raw runtime events, a suite, a full bundle, or a tool catalog question.

path.description: Path to one normalized trace JSON file.

tools.name: review_trace
tools.purpose: Review one already-normalized agent trace for reasoning, tool calls, tool outputs, and final grounding.
quality_checks: Use only after raw runtime exports are normalized.
tools.use_when: Use when the user has a single normalized trace and wants a deterministic or Claude-judged trace review.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the trace is already normalized or when the user gives a full audit bundle.

events_path.description: Path to raw runtime event JSON from an Agent SDK or IDE agent.

tools.name: normalize_runtime
tools.purpose: Convert raw Agent SDK or IDE-agent event exports into the shared trace contract.
quality_checks: Preserve ordered reasoning notes, tool calls, tool results, and final output.
tools.use_when: Use before review when the input is raw runtime events rather than a normalized trace.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for one trace, raw events, or a model matrix comparison.

suite_path.description: Path to a trace regression suite JSON file.

tools.name: trace_suite
tools.purpose: Run a trace regression suite with known-good and known-bad cases.
quality_checks: Check that known-bad cases still fail.
tools.use_when: Use when the user provides a regression suite or asks to rerun many trace cases together.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for isolated tool-description tuning or a single trace without tool inventory.

bundle_path.description: Path to an audit bundle containing tools, traces, metrics, and value-bar proof.

tools.name: audit_agent
tools.purpose: Review a full agent audit bundle containing tool inventory, traces, metrics, and value-bar proof.
quality_checks: Fail the audit when value-bar proof is missing.
tools.use_when: Use when the user provides a bundle or asks for a full agent audit across tools, traces, and value.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user asks to compare model generations or run live provider cells.

bundle_path.description: Path to a tool-selection audit bundle.

tools.name: optimize_tools
tools.purpose: Review tool descriptions, schemas, selection cases, held-out cases, and trace-derived tool failures.
quality_checks: Map each failed check to a concrete tool-description or schema change.
tools.use_when: Use when the user suspects bad tool descriptions, vague schemas, or poor tool-selection cases.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user only has one trace or wants a candidate generated from repeated failures.

matrix_path.description: Path to a model matrix JSON file.

tools.name: model_matrix
tools.purpose: Compare model, provider, harness, instruction, skill, and tool-description variants on the same cases.
quality_checks: Read cell summaries before recommending a prompt, skill, or harness change.
tools.use_when: Use when the user asks about new models, provider differences, harness differences, reasoning modes, skills, or project instructions.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid for the first comparison run or when there are no repeated matrix failures.

matrix_path.description: Path to a model matrix JSON file.

tools.name: grind_harness
tools.purpose: Generate and evaluate candidate tool-description or harness-instruction variants from repeated matrix failures.
quality_checks: Require a live run, held-out cases, a call cap, and a minimum improvement threshold.
tools.use_when: Use after the model matrix shows repeated failures that should be hill-climbed.

cases.name: raw ide events need normalization
cases.task: I exported raw Cursor event JSON from an IDE agent at cursor_events.json. It has tool_call and tool_result events, but it is not in your trace contract yet. Audit it.

cases.name: single normalized trace review
cases.task: Here is one normalized trace JSON at agent_trace_good.json. Check whether the reasoning before and after tools is good and whether the final answer is grounded.

cases.name: trace regression suite
cases.task: Run trace_suite.json, a suite of known-good and known-bad traces and tell me if the regression behavior still holds.

cases.name: full agent audit bundle
cases.task: agent_audit_bundle.json has tool inventory, traces, metrics, and value-bar proof. Review the whole agent.

cases.name: tool descriptions causing bad selection
cases.task: The agent keeps choosing the wrong similar tool. Review the tool descriptions, schemas, and selection cases in tool_selection_bundle.json for the catalog.

cases.name: new model skill tuning
cases.task: We changed model versions and may need to tune the skill and CLAUDE.md instructions. Compare providers and harnesses in skill_matrix.json on the same cases.

cases.name: repeated matrix failures need hill climb
cases.task: The model matrix keeps failing the same boundary across harnesses. Use repeated_failures_matrix.json to generate a candidate harness improvement and confirm it with held-out cases.
